chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1522 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.12.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == This Court vide order dated 23.01.2025 directed the learned counsel for the petitioner to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of the petition in terms of the judgment of Hon’ble Supreme in case of Province of PUNJAB through Secretary (Primary and Secondary Healthcare Department), Lahore and others vs. Hafiz MUHAMMAD KALEEM-UD-DIN (2024 SCMR 689), the counsel sought time to address the issue but today he is called absent without intimation perhaps he has lost interest in the matter, therefore, he is unable to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of the petition in terms of the decision of the Hon’ble Supreme Court. This Court is left with no option but to dismiss the lis in default. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
